name: Imperal Higgsfield
description: Managed Higgsfield Cloud media generation extension for Imperal.

secrets.name: HIGGSFIELD_PROVIDER_HF_KEY
secrets.description: Combined Higgsfield bearer key when hf_key mode is used

secrets.name: HIGGSFIELD_PROVIDER_API_KEY
secrets.description: Provider API key for api_key_secret mode

secrets.name: HIGGSFIELD_PROVIDER_API_SECRET
secrets.description: Provider API secret for api_key_secret mode
